taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: Full-stack web development, Frontend development, JavaScript, React, Node.js
skill_match_scores: Full-stack web development:1.0, Frontend development:0.5, JavaScript:0.5, React:1.0, Node.js:0.5
must_have_quals: 2-5 years of industry experience with modern full-stack web development, with particular emphasis on user facing feature development and full stack, frontend leaning work, Fluent in one or more frontend and backend technologies, Interested in programming in JavaScript and React, Excited by a product-oriented full stack or frontend role, Good understanding of web technologies and large-scale web application architecture, Background in computer science or a related field, Belief that the best product is the one that helps users accomplish their goals while growing the business, Thoughtful approach to decision making; knowing when to move fast and when to do things right, Strong convictions, weakly held and assume validation and iteration are a given to produce the best results, Strong ownership instincts and sweat the details
core_responsibilities: Spec and build product features that are beautiful, consistent, and fast, that encourage exploration, and that earn the trust of our customers through predictable, reliable, and thoughtful interactions, Work at all levels of the stack, from AWS, Node.js, and SQL to React, HTML. and CSS to build and maintain end to end products on Airtable, Partner with product managers, designers, and data scientists to understand the needs of potential users and build a product that unlocks their potential, Work alongside and learn from a talented group of engineers with a diverse range of experiences and backgrounds
job_summary: Airtable is the no-code app platform that empowers organizations to transform their business processes. The Software Engineer, Product Frontend will work with cross-functional teams to design and implement innovative features, ensuring a high-quality user experience while collaborating closely with product management, design, and data science teams.
